overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy RPG showing a student in wizard robes walking from an outdoor castle courtyard through a stone archway into a grand hall with Gothic architecture, stained glass windows, and medieval decor.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle courtyard with Gothic archway entrance

events.description: approaching and entering the covered stone archway from the open courtyard

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the cobblestone courtyard toward the main castle entrance

notable_agents.action: student in green robes walking parallel to the player

entered.detail: large stone archway with pointed Gothic arches serving as the main entrance
weathered stone walls with climbing ivy covering the surface
tall stone wall covered in green and autumn-colored ivy vines

segments.scene_description: The player character walks through a sunlit castle courtyard with cobblestone paths and patches of grass. Other students in wizard robes are scattered about as the character approaches a grand Gothic archway entrance covered in ivy.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered stone entrance corridor with stained glass window ahead

events.description: entering the covered stone corridor from the outdoor courtyard
approaching the bright stained glass window illuminating the end of the corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through the stone archway into the covered entrance corridor

entered.detail: stone vaulted ceiling of the covered entrance passage
rough-hewn stone walls of the entrance corridor
large circular stained glass window with intricate designs at the corridor end

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a covered stone corridor with vaulted ceilings, leaving the outdoor courtyard behind. The corridor leads toward a large illuminated stained glass window at the far end, with ivy creeping along the stone walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand hall with floating mechanical rings and house banners

events.description: entering the great hall from the covered corridor
approaching and beginning to ascend the central stone staircase
turning left toward a side archway with a wooden door

agents.ego_description: walking through the vast hall, examining the floating mechanical rings and approaching the central stairs before turning toward a side passage

entered.detail: vast Gothic hall with high ceilings and stone architecture
large rotating mechanical rings floating in the center of the hall
wide stone staircase leading to an upper level
large blue and yellow banner with the letter H hanging above the stairs
medieval suits of armor standing against the walls
Gothic archway leading to a side corridor with a wooden door

segments.scene_description: The character enters a magnificent great hall featuring a floating mechanical astrolabe, stone staircases, and medieval decor including suits of armor and house banners. The character walks toward the central stairs, passing beneath the Hufflepuff banner, then turns toward a side archway with a wooden door.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, open castle courtyard into the ornate interior of a grand Gothic hall. It begins with the character walking across sunlit cobblestones and grass among fellow students, moving steadily toward an ivy-covered stone archway. As the character passes through the entrance, the scene shifts into a covered corridor with vaulted ceilings, where the natural light fades and the view focuses on a distant, illuminated stained glass window. The camera then expands into a magnificent great hall filled with medieval decor, passing beneath house banners and a floating mechanical astrolabe. Finally, the movement carries the character past suits of armor and toward a central stone staircase before turning toward a side archway with a wooden door.
